# `mise gitlab token`

- **Usage**: `mise gitlab token [--unmask] [HOST]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/gitlab/token.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/gitlab/token.rs)

Display the GitLab token mise will use for a given host

Shows which token source mise would use, useful for debugging
authentication issues. The token is masked by default.

## Arguments

### `[HOST]`

GitLab hostname

**Default:** `gitlab.com`

## Flags

### `--unmask`

Show the full unmasked token

Examples:

```
$ mise gitlab token
gitlab.com: glpa…xxxx (source: GITLAB_TOKEN)

$ mise gitlab token --unmask
gitlab.com: glpat-xxxxxxxxxxxx (source: GITLAB_TOKEN)

$ mise gitlab token gitlab.mycompany.com
gitlab.mycompany.com: (none)
```
